mapper.insert: INSERT INTO packing_outbound_scan ( packing_order_id, detail_id, scan_type, scan_seq, qty, status ) VALUES ( #{packingOrderId}, #{detailId}, #{scanType}, #{scanSeq}, #{qty}, 'WAITING' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM packing_outbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} ORDER BY detail_id, scan_type, scan_seq
SELECT * FROM packing_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} ORDER BY scan_type, scan_seq
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_outbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_outbound_scan WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} AND status = 'DONE'
mapper.update: UPDATE packing_outbound_scan SET status = 'DONE', scanned_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
UPDATE packing_outbound_scan SET status = 'WAITING', scanned_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DONE'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM packing_outbound_scan WHERE detail_id = #{detailId} AND status = 'WAITING'
